checkin.tierGate.hint: Upgrade your tier to unlock daily check-in.
footer.brandIntro: TokenSheep is a not-for-profit AI API gateway. First-hand tokens, full context, straight from upstream — no forwarding, no throttling, no dark patterns. Free tier forever; contribute and we'll bump your limits.
landing.faq.a1: Actually free. Base tier: no sign-up fee, no subscription, no minimum spend. Contribute to upgrade tier — this only sustains the key pool; you can stay on the free tier forever.
landing.faq.a2: We run our own key pool and connect straight to upstream providers (OpenAI / Anthropic / Google, etc.). No middlemen, no third-party forwarding. Most cheap APIs on the market are A→B→C→D reselling chains — we don't play that game.
landing.faq.a3: No. Many stations silently truncate context (e.g. giving you 32k on Claude 200k) to save token cost. We do zero active truncation — whatever upstream gives you is what you get.
landing.faq.a4: Default T0 (free) has RPM and concurrency caps. A small contribution bumps you to the next tier, doubling or multiplying those caps (see the Pricing page for exact numbers). Contribution only goes to sustaining the key pool — no profit taken.
landing.faq.a5: Request contents (prompt / response) live only briefly in the logs we need for billing reconciliation. They are not used to train any model and not resold. Pool tokens only ever proxy your requests — nothing else.
landing.faq.a6.prefix: Honestly: a public station doesn't guarantee 100% SLA. If it really goes down we'll post a notice. If you need it urgently, use the sister site
landing.faq.a7: Every user comes to fleece a little — we're the sheep, you're the shearer. It's not our money paying for the upstream API anyway.
landing.faq.title: Everything worth asking, right here
landing.features.bestEffort.desc: Public station, no 100% SLA. We fight to keep endpoints up and premium models from 429ing — but when it dies, it dies. Transparent notice, sister-site fallback, no cover-ups.
landing.features.bestEffort.title: Best effort
landing.features.free.desc: Sign up and go. No paywall, no upsell, no minimum spend — the point of a public station is to let your own crew drink for free.
landing.features.fullContext.desc: Whatever upstream gives you, you get — no active truncation. Fill your 128k / 200k window and we relay it as-is.
landing.features.fullContext.title: Full context
landing.features.noNesting.desc: One-hop key pool, direct upstream. No multi-hop forwarding, no silent model swaps, none of the "I forward to him forwarding to him" shell game.
landing.features.noNesting.title: No forwarding chains
landing.features.title: Four things we won't compromise on
landing.head.description: TokenSheep is a not-for-profit public-good AI API gateway. First-hand tokens · full context · no forwarding chains · no dilution. OpenAI · Claude · Gemini · Grok · DeepSeek · Qwen unified access — free tier forever.
landing.head.ogDescription: First-hand tokens · full context · no forwarding · no dilution. Unified access to OpenAI · Claude · Gemini · Grok · DeepSeek · Qwen.
landing.head.ogTitle: TokenSheep · Wool-Pooling Public Good — Free AI API Global Gateway
landing.head.title: TokenSheep · Wool-Pooling Public Good — Free AI API Global Gateway
landing.hero.subtitle: A unified gateway to global LLMs — one link, every major model.
landing.hero.subtitleTail: First-hand tokens · full context · no throttling · no forwarding chains.
landing.pricing.more: More models · go to the model marketplace
landing.pricing.subtitle: Mainstream models · openly priced · no hidden fees
landing.pricing.title: Whatever upstream charges, we charge zero
landing.story.fallbackNote: To stay up long-term, if things really break we may plug in a backup API — and we'll tell you honestly. If it goes down entirely, sorry about that — hop to our sister site:
landing.story.line1: It started plainly — we needed to use the API ourselves.
landing.story.line2Emphasis: we hit dozens of pitfalls and met a whole pack of scammers
landing.story.line3Prefix: So we opened the road we blazed:
landing.story.line3Tail: , no forwarding chains, no hidden dilution, transparent bills.
landing.story.line4Highlight: we just opened it up for our crew — free
landing.story.painsAftermath: All of it — we've been through it for you.
landing.tier.moreLink: See the full tier & model unlock list
landing.tier.subtitle: The key pool is a shared, finite resource. To make sure most people get through and premium models don't get 429'd into the ground, we tier by contribution — the more you chip in, the higher your RPM, concurrency, and available models.
landing.tier.subtitleTail: This isn't a subscription — it's giving back. You never lose the free base tier.

landing.tier.t3.name: T3 · Bestie
landing.tier.title: Why tiers at all?
